transcript: I wouldn't have any place to graze the live lambs.
The lambs are filled with helium?
How could they be live if they were '[beep]' filled with helium?
What are you saying? Wha... what are you trying to say?
What I'm trying to say... You said that I have a delivery of live, living lambs. As in the animals. Am I correct?
How '[beep]' could they be filled with helium and still be alive? They're floating within a package.
So, they're live, packaged helium lambs. Why don't you just take them out of the package and let them float here?
Hey, you want, you can come on over. You can get a taste of my whip '[beep]' any time.
Come on, come on, come on.
Nuh-uh. You'll be eating some twelve-gauge lead.
